case_title: JILL NGUYEN VS. NEVIN CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NEVIN CONSTRUCTION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. ON CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROCESS OF SERVICE. THIS MOTION IS GRANTED. THE COURT HEARS THE MATTER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JILL NGUYEN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NEVIN CONSTRUCTION, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE NEVIN RUAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT NGUYEN, JILL RECOVER FROM APPELLANT NEVIN CONSTRUCTION, INC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DAY AS REGULARLY SCHEDULED FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL IN DEPT. 525 WITH THE COURT, THE APPELLANT, MS. JILL NGUYEN, AND RESPONDENT, MR. NEVIN RUAN, PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM. BOTH PARTIES READ AND SIGN A STIPULATION AND ORDER TO AGREE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM HEAR THE MATTER; THE ORDER IS SIGNED BY THE COURT AND FILED BY THE CLERK (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT). THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO BOTH SIDES; THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND PROCEEDS TO HEAR STATEMENTS PRESENTED TO THE COURT BY RESPECTIVE PARTIES PRESENT.

AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH THE APPELLANT JILL NGUYEN AND BY THE RESPONDENT MR. NEVIN RUAN, AND AFTER RECEIVING, READING AND REVIEWING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED TO THE COURT BY EACH SIDE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AT 9:53 A.M. ALL EXHIBITS INTRODUCED AND PROVIDED TO THE COURT ARE THEREUPON RETURNED THIS DATE TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES. BOTH SIDES ARE ADVISED THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S DECISION VIA MAIL TO THE ADDRESSES ON FILE WITH THE COURT.

9:57 A.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED.

PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID H.S. COMMINS; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Judgment Entered

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2016 Continued To Oct-14-16 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-29-2016 Judgment Entered
